report_data: 18 patients admitted with severe dehydration and vomiting. Laboratory confirms cholera. Local water pump is broken, residents using river water.
Seeing a lot of people getting sick with high fever near the market. Is there a flu going around? #HealthAlert #Ethiopia
Local authorities report a spike in malaria cases following the heavy rains last week. Hospital capacity reaching 90%.
Group of 40 migrants intercepted. 5 individuals showing signs of viral hemorrhagic fever. Quarantine initialized. Security heightened.
Respiratory illness affecting 10 children. Persistent cough and high temperature. Supply of antibiotics is low.
